title: /lis
text: /lis Produce compile listings of ProcScript modules for components, application shells, menus, and global ProcScript. /lis { = 1 | 2 } Used With /aps or /app /all /cpt /esv /dsp /frm /lib /men /rpt /ssv /svc /usp Parameters Table 1. Script Listing Level Value Meaning 1 Generates a basic script listing with no precompiler directives. 2 Generates a script listing that includes precompiler directives Description If you do not specify a listing level, level 1 is used. If the /inf sub-switch is used with /lis=2 , the ProcScript listing includes additional compilation error, warning, and info messages. Related Links Script Listings A script listing is an ASCII file containing a concatenated list of all the compiled script in a component, application shell, menu, or global ProcScript. Separate script listings are generated for script in entity collection and entity occurrence triggers. Generate and View Script Listings You can configure Uniface to generate script listings by setting the $LISTING_LEVEL assignment setting or by using the /lis command line switch. $LISTING_LEVEL Produce compile listings of ProcScript modules. /inf Display the information listing plus warning and error messages when compiling.
